title: leucas chinensis
intro: Leucas chinensis, also known as Chinese desert lavender, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. Leucas chinensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
